components.value: V, S, F (jet gemstones worth a total of 10,000 gp)

area.value: 1-mile radius emanating from the touched point

description.value: By touching the ground, you curse an area to remain in bleak darkness, as the endless night curse. The focus merges into the cursed area as part of the spell and can only be retrieved if the curse is lifted.
